content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Ichihime and Triangle". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/1337/A
content.inputFormat: The input will contain a single integer n, which represents the length of the side of the triangle.
content.outputFormat: Print 'YES' if it is possible to make a triangle with the given side length, otherwise print 'NO'.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Check if the sum of the lengths of any two sides is greater than the length of the third side.
